description: A Spring Boot service class that handles filesystem storage operations for document files, including writing, resolving paths, and deleting stored document content.

classes.name: DocumentStorageService
classes.description: Service class for storing, resolving, and deleting document byte files on the filesystem, scoped under a configurable root directory.

methods.name: write
methods.description: Stores the provided InputStream content to disk under a path constructed from userId and documentId; returns a storage key relative to the storage root.

methods.name: resolveToPath
methods.description: Converts a storage key into an absolute filesystem Path, ensuring safety against path traversal.

methods.name: deleteIfExists
methods.description: Deletes the stored file corresponding to the given storage key if it exists, attempting cleanup of empty parent directories.
